Class UserSession

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.session.UserSession
public class UserSession extends Object
In-memory session for the signed-in staff user JWT and profile hints. One global instance matches a single desktop stage. Clear on logout before reuse.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearSession()
    Clears all session values during logout.
    void
    createSession(User user, String jwtToken)
    Starts a session from authenticated user and JWT token values.
    List<Integer>
    getAccessibleBakeryIds()
    Returns read-only bakery id scope for analytics views.
    String
    getApiUserId()
    Returns API principal id.
    User
    getCurrentUser()
    Returns current signed-in user model.
    String
    getEmployeeProfileId()
    Returns employee profile id used for analytics scoping.
    static UserSession
    getInstance()
    Returns singleton desktop session instance.
    String
    getJwtToken()
    Returns current JWT token.
    LocalDateTime
    getLoginTime()
    Returns login timestamp for the active session.
    String
    getProfileFirstName()
    Returns profile first name hint.
    String
    getProfileLastName()
    Returns profile last name hint.
    String
    getProfilePhotoUrl()
    Returns profile photo URL when available.
    String
    getUserRole()
    Returns current user role label.
    boolean
    isAdmin()
    Returns true when active session role is ADMIN.
    boolean
    isAuthenticated()
    Returns whether a user is currently authenticated.
    boolean
    isEmployee()
    Returns true when active session role is EMPLOYEE.
    void
    setApiUserId(String apiUserId)
    Sets API principal id used for chat and scoped API calls.
    void
    setEmployeeAnalyticsAccess(String employeeProfileId, List<Integer> bakeryIds)
    Sets employee analytics scope values for bakery-filtered dashboards.
    void
    setProfileDisplayHints(String firstName, String lastName, String profilePhotoPath)
    Sets optional profile display hints used by sidebar avatar UI.

      Returns profile photo URL when available.

      Returns profile first name hint.

      Returns profile last name hint.

      Returns current user role label.

      Returns login timestamp for the active session.

    • isAdmin

      public boolean isAdmin()
      Returns true when active session role is ADMIN.

    • isEmployee

      public boolean isEmployee()
      Returns true when active session role is EMPLOYEE.

      Returns employee profile id used for analytics scoping.

      public List<Integer> getAccessibleBakeryIds()
      Returns read-only bakery id scope for analytics views.
